subcodes.first_line: The letter from your honored self was perused, and We were indeed grieved by its contents. God, glorified and exalted be He, is verily the Witness and Testimony that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب ملاحظه شد قد حزنا بما فیه ولکن حق جل و عز شاهد و گواه است که
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @consolation and comfort, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
